form.formComment: Won her last two including a good win last start over 525m at The Meadows by 0.6 lengths in a Grade 5. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won her last two including a good win last start over 525m at The Meadows by 0.6 lengths in a Grade 5. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but before that placed two on end, the most recent when second (29.59) at big odds over 512m at Mt Gambier. Has a low draw but will need a little luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of the placings last time but before that placed two on end, the most recent when second (29.59) at big odds over 512m at Mt Gambier. Has a low draw but will need a little luck to feature.

form.formComment: Won her last two including a strong win last start over 510m at Sale by 2.75 lengths in a Rank Limit - Grade 5. Can bring up a hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won her last two including a strong win last start over 510m at Sale by 2.75 lengths in a Rank Limit - Grade 5. Can bring up a hat-trick.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Warrnambool over 450m in 25.33. Followed that up with a minor placing over 515m at this track at Grade 5 a week ago. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Warrnambool over 450m in 25.33. Followed that up with a minor placing over 515m at this track at Grade 5 a week ago. Be tough to make an impression against this lot.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning by 2.25 lengths at Sale (24.65) beating Dr. Gianna in a Restricted WIN on April 12 four days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and she needs to find another gear.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after winning by 2.25 lengths at Sale (24.65) beating Dr. Gianna in a Restricted WIN on April 12 four days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and she needs to find another gear.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 515m at this track behind Lektra Isa beaten 6 lengths (30.13). Placed two back at Warrnambool. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (28.89) over 510m at Sale. Jumps from a wide draw. Worth including.

formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (28.89) over 510m at Sale. Jumps from a wide draw. Worth including.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 515m at this track beaten 9 lengths (30.21) behind Fast Freddy in a Grade 5 on April 9. Has run slick time here with a 29.46 PB at the distance. Go close.
